_note: EXAMPLE SEED — synthetic rows so the pipeline + UI render end-to-end. Replace with a live export before drawing conclusions.
_how_to_refresh: Paris MoU publishes a public detention list (https://www.parismou.org/detentions-banning/current-detentions) and Tokyo MoU likewise (https://www.tokyo-mou.org). Export to this JSON shape (or CSV — see README) and re-run: bun run load-psc <path>.
_schema: detentions[]: { imo, vessel_name, flag(iso2), authority, port, detained_on(YYYY-MM-DD), released_on, deficiencies(int), detention_days(int), source_url }
